content: We can frame Self-Refine's iterative self-improvement pipeline as a 'single-perspective bootstrap' for LLM self-reflection, and integrate multiple inconsistent perspectives from LLM self-reflection mechanisms into each Self-Refine iteration to create a stronger zero-training self-refinement framework. This hybrid framework retains Self-Refine's key advantage of requiring no extra supervised data or model training while mitigating the blind spots that come with single-perspective self-feedback.
